items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing a double wave of scam activity right now. With the end of financial year period still fresh and Amazon Prime Day sales underway, cybercriminals are actively targeting Australians through fake deals, phishing emails, and fraudulent websites. Authorities are urging people to be extra cautious about unsolicited messages offering discounts or requesting payment details.

**Practical tip:** Before clicking any sale link or "special offer" email, go directly to the retailer's official website by typing the address yourself rather than following a link.

featured.title: SMS Sender ID Register goes live to help protect Australians from scams
featured.quote: New SMS Sender ID Register helps Australians combat the growing wave of scam messages targeting citizens.
